typing_issues.issue: Generic form field handlers with loose typing
Error handling and form submission with any types
Error and form handlers with loose typing
Mutation and form handlers without strict types
Multiple callback parameters with any typing
Mutation and form handlers with any types
Form field handler without strict type
Form field handler with any type

form_handling_patterns.issue: Repeated pattern: const f = (field: string, value: any) => setForm(p => ({ ...p, [field]: value }))
form_handling_patterns.recommendation: Extract to custom hook useFormField or createFieldUpdater utility

top_duplicators.issue: Very large hook mixing auth, permissions, and logging - should be split
Mixed concerns: nursing operations + data fetching

prop_drilling_risk.issue: Large components passing multiple props through nested layers without Context API
prop_drilling_risk.recommendation: Implement Context API for module-level state or use prop-drilling libraries like Jotai/Zustand

magic_numbers.recommendation: Extract validation constants to src/lib/constants.ts or src/lib/validation.ts

state_management_issues.issue: Direct localStorage access instead of abstracted store - GDPR/privacy concerns
state_management_issues.recommendation: Centralize storage logic with src/lib/storage.ts abstraction layer

providers_detected: TooltipProvider (for UI only, not app state)
missing_contexts: No AuthContext - auth calls scattered across components
No PermissionsContext - permissions checked via hooks
No UserContext - user data fetched multiple times
No ThemeContext - potential for theme management
context_api_analysis.recommendation: Implement app-level Context for auth/user/permissions to reduce prop drilling

positive: React Query integration (useQuery, useMutation) - good data fetching abstraction
negative: No clear separation of concerns in large modules
Missing data layer abstraction (API calls scattered)
localStorage accessed directly instead of through abstraction
Autogenerated Supabase files not excluded from custom code
No visible error boundary usage in most modules

recommendations_order: Break down massive components (>1500 lines) - focus on SaidaProntuariosModule.ts, RestauranteModule.tsx, CMEArea.tsx
Replace any-type usage with properly typed interfaces and discriminated unions
Extract form handling patterns into custom hooks (useFormField, useFormState)
Implement Context API for app-level state (auth, permissions, user)
Consolidate duplicate mutations into factory functions/custom hooks
Abstract storage layer for localStorage/sessionStorage access
Split large hooks into focused, single-responsibility hooks
Create constants file for magic numbers and recurring values
Add comprehensive error boundaries to all major modules
